title: Connector Configuration Management
description: Operator configures connector properties, applies filters, and validates settings for binlog-based CDC connectors (MySQL/MariaDB)

actors.name: Operator
actors.description: Human administrator configuring and managing the Debezium connector deployment

actors.name: ServiceRegistry
actors.description: Service provider framework that instantiates charset and other services

actors.name: OpenShiftCluster
actors.description: OpenShift/Kubernetes cluster hosting the connector operator (via OperatorController)

actors.name: BinlogDatabase
actors.description: MySQL or MariaDB database being captured

use_cases.name: Configure Connection Properties
use_cases.description: Set hostname, port, username, password, server ID, and initial SQL statements

use_cases.name: Configure SSL Settings
use_cases.description: Set SSL keystore, truststore paths and passwords for secure connection

use_cases.name: Set Snapshot Mode
use_cases.description: Choose snapshot strategy: always, initial, no_data, recovery, never, initial_only, configuration_based, custom, when_needed

use_cases.name: Configure Table/Database Filters
use_cases.description: Define include/exclude lists for databases and tables; ignore built-in system tables

use_cases.name: Configure GTID Filters
use_cases.description: Specify GTID source ranges to include or exclude; toggle DML event filtering and recovery behavior

use_cases.name: Set Binlog Streaming Options
use_cases.description: Configure binlog buffer size, net read/write timeouts, row count threshold for streaming result sets

use_cases.name: Configure Data Type Handling
use_cases.description: Set temporal precision mode, BIGINT UNSIGNED handling, time adjuster, and cursor fetch behavior

use_cases.name: Configure Event Handling Modes
use_cases.description: Set failure handling for event deserialization errors, inconsistent schema events, and SQL query inclusion

use_cases.name: Validate Configuration
use_cases.description: Trigger validation of config fields — time precision mode compatibility, GTID exclusion logic, event deserialization mode

use_cases.name: Validate Binlog Database Configuration
use_cases.description: Connector checks database has ROW binlog_format and FULL binlog_row_image before streaming

use_cases.name: Validate Snapshot Feasibility
use_cases.description: Connector checks earliest binlog filename to warn about purged binlogs when no offset context exists

use_cases.name: Register Charset Service
use_cases.description: ServiceRegistry calls provider to instantiate the correct BinlogCharsetRegistry implementation for MySQL or MariaDB

use_cases.name: Manage Operator Lifecycle
use_cases.description: Enable or disable the connector operator deployment by scaling replicas up/down in OpenShift

use_cases.name: Configure Operator Environment
use_cases.description: Set or unset environment variables on operator deployment containers; set image pull policy

use_cases.name: Deploy Pull Secret
use_cases.description: Load a Secret YAML, create the secret in OpenShift, link it to default/builder service accounts, and apply to operator

important_notes: BinlogConnectorConfig is abstract — MySQL and MariaDB connectors provide concrete implementations
Built-in DB names excluded by default: mysql, performance_schema, sys, information_schema
Default port: 3306; default binlog buffer size: 0 (buffering disabled)
SnapshotMode includes: always, when_needed, initial, no_data, recovery, never, initial_only, configuration_based, custom
OperatorController is testing infrastructure (OpenShift), not production connector code
CharsetRegistry providers are SPI implementations selected per connector type (MySQL vs MariaDB)
BinlogTaskContext is minimal — wraps rawConfig + BinlogConnectorConfig and delegates to CdcSourceTaskContext
